company.name: Krevio
company.tagline: We build complete online systems for local service businesses

core_build.description: Custom website + AI chatbot + owner dashboard + GEO/SEO optimization
core_build.ownership: Client owns everything — website, leads, data, code

managed_services.description: Ongoing chatbot management, content updates, GEO monitoring, priority support

features: Custom mobile-first website on your domain
AI chatbot in English and Spanish — answers questions 24/7
Owner dashboard to track leads, follow-ups, pipeline
GEO/SEO — get found on Google AND AI search (ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity)
Communication automation — missed call recovery, follow-up sequences, review requests
You own everything we build — no per-lead fees, no lock-in

hvac.highlights: System tracking, maintenance plans, seasonal campaigns

differentiators: vs Thumbtack/Angi: You own nothing there. With us, you own everything.
vs Big agencies: They charge $10K+ for setup. We build custom starting at $2,500.
vs Freelancers: Lottery quality. We deliver agency-grade work with AI precision.
vs DIY (Wix/Squarespace): Generic templates. We build systems, not pages.
GEO optimization: We optimize for AI search (ChatGPT, Gemini), not just Google.
geo_explanation: GEO stands for Generative Engine Optimization. When someone asks ChatGPT or Google AI for a plumber near them, GEO makes sure YOUR business shows up. It's like SEO but for AI search engines — and almost nobody is doing it yet.
process: Step 1: Discovery — Tell us about your business. We show you a working demo tailored to your industry.
Step 2: Build — We build your complete system in 2-4 weeks. Website, chatbot, dashboard, GEO.
Step 3: Launch + Grow — Your system goes live on your domain. You own everything. Optional managed services to keep growing.

faq.a: Projects start at $2,500 for a complete custom build. We can give you a more precise quote in about 2 minutes if you tell us about your business.
Yes. Your website, your leads, your data, your code — all yours. If you ever cancel managed services, everything stays with you.
The build is a one-time investment. Managed services (chatbot hosting, content updates, GEO monitoring) are optional, starting at $500/month. Cancel anytime.

faq.q: Do you work with businesses outside DFW?
faq.a: We're based in DFW and specialize in local service businesses here, but we can work with businesses anywhere.
Most projects launch in 2-4 weeks from kickoff.
GEO is Generative Engine Optimization — it makes your business show up when people search using AI tools like ChatGPT, Google AI, or Perplexity. Think of it as SEO for the AI age.
